title: Dashboard Filters

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello !! i am looking to filter all the widgets in my dashboard - based on one widget who will serve as a slicer .
for now when i click on one category in one widget the remaining widgets remain no filtered .
please help

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: That is not what i asked for… of course i use these filters , i wanted to know if there is an option where all the widget are filtered according to the category you click on, in one widget (as in power bi)
